versions.version_description: Tablature of intro and main riff, all lyrics and breaks with accompanying chords, Full chord legend included . https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aGCdLKXNF3w. Live TV performance in Standard tuning - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NZ-o1N2swMw.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World

content:
[Intro]

[ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]  x4

[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Welcome to your life [/tab]
There's no turning back 
Even while we sleep 
We will find you 
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Acting on your best behaviour [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Turn your back on mother nature [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
It's my own design [/tab]
It's my own remorse 
Help me to decide 
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Help me make the most [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Of freedom and of pleasure [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]D/A[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
There's a room where the light won't find you [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Holding hands while the walls come tumbling down [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
When they do I'll be right behind you [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
So glad we've almost made it [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
So sad they had to fade it [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]               
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]


[Solo]

[ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D/A[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch] 
[ch]F#m[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
I can't stand this indecision [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Married with a lack of vision [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                 
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
Say that you'll never never never never need it [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
One headline why believe it ? [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D/A[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
All for freedom and for pleasure [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D/A[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world [/tab]

(Repeat Intro, then fade out)
